class="jCAhz ChMk0b"><span class="ryNqvb">For reflexes, instincts, and emotions, each recognized model of an external factor must be associated with a response model (stored in memory).</span></span> span.span: By using models stored in memory and recognizing external objects and processes with them, one can determine the necessary responses to the emergence of external factors to avoid threats and ensure survival.
For reflexes, instincts, and emotions, each recognized model of an external factor must be associated with a response model (stored in memory).
For thinking, an NN-model of pattern recognition must be stored in memory.
For consciousness, a metamodel of "Self + World + Society" must be present.
